summary: Iteration 17: Frontend-only testing of stream parsing fixes. All tests PASS - responses now render reliably in chat UI after sending prompts. Verified on both Desktop (1920x1080) and Android (390x844) viewports. SSE buffering with partial line handling is properly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: SSE buffering properly implemented in handleSend(): sseBuffer maintains partial lines across chunks
processSseLine() correctly parses data: lines and handles JSON errors gracefully (try/catch ignores partial JSON)
Final chunk handling: tail processing after stream ends ensures no data loss
Error surfacing: toast.error() called for model errors (line 1008) and stream failures (line 1048)
TextDecoder with stream:true option properly handles multi-byte character boundaries
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration 16 test database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified that the frontend stream parser hardening is working correctly. The handleSend function properly buffers SSE chunks, handles partial lines, and renders responses reliably. Both Desktop and Android viewports tested successfully with responses appearing within 10 seconds of sending prompts.

feature_1_send_prompt_verify_response.details: Sent 'Hello, please respond with a simple greeting.' - received responses from gpt-5.2 ('Hello!') and claude-sonnet ('Hello! Nice to meet you.')

feature_2_sse_partial_line_handling.details: sseBuffer implementation verified: lines 945, 1020-1027, 1029-1032 in ChatPage.js properly buffer partial lines and process complete lines

feature_3_error_surfacing.details: toast.error() calls at lines 1008 (model errors) and 1048 (stream failures) will surface errors to user

feature_4_android_viewport_regression.details: Android viewport (390x844) tested - chat top bar visible, menu button visible, chat input visible, responses rendered correctly

code_review_sse_implementation.chunk_processing: lines 1016-1027: read loop with split('\n'), pop() for partial, process complete lines
code_review_sse_implementation.tail_processing: lines 1029-1032: process remaining buffer after stream ends
code_review_sse_implementation.error_handling: line 1010-1012: try/catch ignores partial JSON, line 1046-1049: stream errors show toast
code_review_sse_implementation.multi_byte_safe: line 1020: decoder.decode(value, { stream: true }) handles character boundaries

rca_of_original_issue.reported_symptom: Responses not forthcoming in chat UI
rca_of_original_issue.fix_applied: Frontend stream parser hardening - SSE buffering with partial line handling added to handleSend()
rca_of_original_issue.verification: After fix, responses render reliably within 10 seconds on both Desktop and Android viewports
rca_of_original_issue.root_cause_speculation: Previous implementation likely did not properly buffer partial SSE lines across chunks, causing JSON parse failures and dropped content
